stories.description: UX Quick Fixes: Contrast, Sizing, Date Format, Tab Order

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: `formatDate("2026-04-10")` returns `"Apr 10, 2026"` and `formatDate("")` returns `"---"`
`formatDateTime("2026-04-10T14:30:00Z")` returns a string containing `"Apr 10, 2026"` and a time component
`TriageWorkspacePanel.tsx` source contains 0 instances of `opacity-60` or `opacity-70` on text elements
`TriageWorkspacePanel.tsx` inactive tab classes use `text-slate-400` instead of `text-slate-600`
`LoadList.tsx` renders dates via `formatDate()` -- 0 instances of raw `{load.pickupDate}` remain in rendered output
0 instances of `text-[10px]` on interactive buttons remain in `LoadList.tsx`, `IntelligenceHub.tsx` tabs, and `QuoteManager.tsx` tabs -- all changed to `text-[11px]`
`QuoteManager.tsx` default `activeView` is `"intake"` and `Intake Desk` button renders before `Pipeline View`
`IntelligenceHub.tsx` tab array includes `{ label: "SAFETY", tab: "safety" }` after `COMMAND`
When `selectedTab === "safety"`, `IntelligenceHub.tsx` renders `ExceptionConsole` with `initialView="safety"`
`TriageWorkspacePanel.tsx` header panel background uses `bg-white/[0.08]` instead of `bg-white/[0.03]`
`LoadDetailView.tsx` renders a visible `"Back to Load Board"` button with `ArrowLeft` icon above the manifest header
Clicking the back button in `LoadDetailView.tsx` calls the `onClose` prop exactly 1 time
`IntelligenceHub.tsx` renders a breadcrumb bar showing the current tab label when `selectedTab !== "ops"`

stories.description: Call Button Fix (Load Board + Comms Overlay)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: `LoadList.tsx` Call button calls `window.open("tel:555-0100")` when `load.customerContact.phone` is `"555-0100"`
`LoadList.tsx` Call button falls back to `onOpenHub('messaging', true)` when `load.customerContact.phone` is `undefined`
`LoadList.tsx` Call button shows tooltip with phone number `"555-0100"` on hover when phone is available
`CommsOverlay.tsx` renders a clickable `<a href="tel:555-0100">` link when the active call session contact has a phone number
`LoadDetailView.tsx` renders a `"Notify Partners"` button in the action bar next to `"Tag for Action"`
Clicking `"Notify Partners"` opens an inline modal with >= 1 contact checkboxes extracted from load data (`brokerId`, `driverId`, `customerContact`)
Submitting the modal sends `POST /api/notification-jobs` with `channel: "Multi"`, selected contacts as `recipients[]`, and the message text
A success toast with text `"Notification sent"` appears after successful POST returns 200
An error toast appears when the `POST /api/notification-jobs` fails with status >= 400

`extractLoadInfo` schema `properties.load.properties` includes `freightType` (STRING), `driverPay` (NUMBER), `dropoffDate` (STRING), `pickupAppointmentTime` (STRING), `dropoffAppointmentTime` (STRING) -- 5 new fields

`extractLoadInfo` schema `properties.load.properties` includes `bolNumber` (STRING), `specialInstructions` (STRING), `palletCount` (NUMBER), `containerNumber` (STRING), `chassisNumber` (STRING) -- 5 more new fields
`extractLoadInfo` prompt string contains keywords `"equipment type"`, `"delivery date"`, `"appointment"`, `"BOL"`, `"special"`, `"pallet"`, `"container"`, `"chassis"`
`BookingPortal.tsx` maps 3 new fields from extraction: `data.freightType` to `equipmentType`, `data.dropoffDate`, and `data.specialInstructions`

gateCmds.unit: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/components/BookingPortal.extraction-mapping.test.tsx && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --config server/vitest.config.ts server/__tests__/services/gemini-schema.test.ts

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Tagging a load sends `POST /api/dispatch-events` with `event_type: "ACTION_TAGGED"` and `load_id` matching the current load
Removing a tag sends `POST /api/dispatch-events` with `event_type: "ACTION_UNTAGGED"` and `load_id` matching the current load
Failure to POST the dispatch event (status >= 400) does not render an error toast -- `screen.queryByText("Failed")` returns `null`
After a billable `DETENTION_FLAGGED` event is inserted, `deliverNotification` is called with `channel: "email"` and `subject` containing `"Detention"`
After a `DISCREPANCY_FLAGGED` event is inserted, `deliverNotification` is called with `channel: "email"` and `subject` containing `"Discrepancy"`
After a successful BOL scan at `POST /api/loads/:id/bol-scan`, `deliverNotification` is called with `channel: "email"` and `subject` containing `"BOL"`
If `deliverNotification` rejects (throws), the parent pipeline still returns a valid result (fire-and-forget pattern)
Migration `055_quote_margin_columns.sql` adds 5 columns: `margin`, `discount`, `commission`, `estimated_driver_pay`, `company_cost_factor` to `quotes` table
`company_cost_factor` has `DEFAULT 50.00` in migration `055`
`createQuoteSchema` and `updateQuoteSchema` accept 5 new numeric fields: `margin`, `discount`, `commission`, `estimated_driver_pay`, `company_cost_factor`
`QUOTE_UPDATABLE_COLUMNS` array includes all 5 strings: `"margin"`, `"discount"`, `"commission"`, `"estimated_driver_pay"`, `"company_cost_factor"`
`quoteRepository.create()` INSERT SQL includes all 5 new column names
`createQuoteSchema.parse({ margin: "invalid" })` rejects with a Zod validation error

Migration `056_digital_agreements.sql` creates `digital_agreements` table with 9 columns: `id`, `company_id`, `load_id`, `rate_con_data` JSON, `status` ENUM, `signature_data` JSON, `signed_at`, `created_at`, `updated_at`
`POST /api/agreements` creates a `DRAFT` agreement and returns status 201 with `{ id, status: "DRAFT" }`
`GET /api/agreements/:id` returns the full agreement record with status 200 or returns status 404
`PATCH /api/agreements/:id/sign` updates `status` to `"SIGNED"` and stores `signature_data` JSON, returning status 200
`PATCH /api/agreements/:id/sign` returns status 409 when the agreement `status` is already `"SIGNED"`
`LoadDetailView.tsx` renders a `"Generate Agreement"` button that sends `POST /api/agreements` on click
`POST /api/agreements` rejects with status 400 when `load_id` is missing from the request body
`PATCH /api/agreements/:id/sign` rejects with status 400 when `signature_data` is missing from the request body

gateCmds.unit: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --config server/vitest.config.ts server/__tests__/migrations/056_digital_agreements.test.ts server/__tests__/routes/agreements.test.ts && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/components/LoadDetailView.agreement-button.test.tsx

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Migration `057_financial_objectives.sql` creates `financial_objectives` table with columns `id`, `company_id`, `quarter` (VARCHAR(7)), `revenue_target`, `expense_budget`, `profit_target`, `notes`, `created_at`, `updated_at`
`GET /api/financial-objectives?quarter=2026-Q2` returns status 200 with array of objectives filtered by `quarter` parameter
`POST /api/financial-objectives` creates a new objective and returns status 201
`AnalyticsDashboard.tsx` renders a quarter selector with 4 options (`Q1`-`Q4`) that filters displayed lane data
`AnalyticsDashboard.tsx` displays `"Actual vs Target"` progress bars when >= 1 financial objective exists for the selected quarter
`AnalyticsDashboard.tsx` shows a `"Set quarterly targets"` prompt when 0 objectives exist for the selected quarter
`GET /api/financial-objectives?quarter=invalid` rejects with status 400 when the `quarter` parameter fails `YYYY-QN` format validation

gateCmds.unit: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --config server/vitest.config.ts server/__tests__/migrations/057_financial_objectives.test.ts server/__tests__/routes/financial-objectives.test.ts && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/components/AnalyticsDashboard.quarterly.test.tsx

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: `GET /api/analytics/lane-trends?months=6` returns status 200 with array of objects containing `lane`, `month`, `avgRate`, `volume`, `trend` (`"up"` / `"down"` / `"flat"`)
Trend `"up"` when current month avg rate exceeds previous month by > 5%, `"down"` when < -5%, `"flat"` otherwise
`Intelligence.tsx` renders >= 1 `TrendingUp` or `TrendingDown` icon elements matching `data-testid="trend-indicator-up"` or `"trend-indicator-down"` for each lane
`Intelligence.tsx` fetches from `GET /api/analytics/lane-trends` and displays >= 1 lane row with `avgRate` and `trend` values

gateCmds.unit: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --config server/vitest.config.ts server/__tests__/routes/analytics.lane-trends.test.ts && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/components/Intelligence.market-trends.test.tsx

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All 10 modified frontend components render with `consoleErrors.length === 0` in the smoke test
`LoadList` renders formatted dates matching `/[A-Z][a-z]{2} \d{1,2}, \d{4}/` pattern (not raw ISO strings) in the smoke test
`"SAFETY"` tab, `"Notify Partners"` button, and `"Generate Agreement"` button are all found via `screen.getByText()` in the smoke test renders

gateCmds.unit: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose src/__tests__/integration/ux-remediation.smoke.test.tsx && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --config server/vitest.config.ts --exclude=server/__tests__/integration/** --exclude=server/__tests__/regression/** --exclude=server/__tests__/performance/**
